samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_8bit">
    <description>Implement an 8-bit unsigned multiplier using pipelined processing. Use the provided template and fill in the implementation details.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="mul_en_in">Input enable signal controlling the multiplication process.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplicand input signal.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplier input signal.</input>
        <output id="mul_en_out">Output enable signal indicating the availability of the product.</output>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[15:0]">Product output signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <!-- Define any necessary parameters here -->
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        // Sequential logic for pipeline stages
        reg [7:0] mul_a_reg;
        reg [7:0] mul_b_reg;
        reg [15:0] sum[7:0];
        reg [15:0] mul_out_reg;
        reg [1:0] mul_en_out_reg;
        
        integer i;
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (~rst_n) begin
                mul_en_out_reg <= 2'b00;
            end else begin
                mul_en_out_reg <= {mul_en_out_reg[0], mul_en_out_reg[1]};
            end
        end
        
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (~rst_n) begin
                mul_a_reg <= 8'd0;
                mul_b_reg <= 8'd0;
            end else begin
                if (mul_en_in == 1'b1) begin
                    mul_a_reg <= mul_a;
                    mul_b_reg <= mul_b;
                end
            end
        end
        
        genvar j;
        generate
            for(j = 0; j < 8; j=j+1) begin : gen_partial_products
                wire [7:0] temp;
                
                assign temp = (mul_b_reg[j]) ? ((mul_a_reg >> j)) : 8'd0;
                always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
                    if (~rst_n) begin
                        sum[j] <= 16'd0;
                    end else begin
                        if (j == 0) begin
                            sum[j] <= temp;
                        end else begin
                            sum[j] <= sum[j-1] + temp;
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        endgenerate
        
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (~rst_n) begin
                mul_out_reg <= 16'd0;
            end else begin
                mul_out_reg <= sum[7];
            end
        end
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Combinational logic for the multiplier
        assign mul_en_out = mul_en_out_reg[1];
        assign mul_out = (mul_en_out_reg[1]) ? mul_out_reg : 16'd0;
    </implementation>
</module>
